message:
refactor(service): migrate load_balance to parking_lot::Mutex; add router state tests

load_balance.rs: Replace std::sync::Mutex with parking_lot::Mutex for
the backends list and Weighted strategy state. This removes the need
for .unwrap() on lock() calls since parking_lot mutexes are not
poisonable, and provides better performance under contention.

router.rs: Add tests for multiple typed state extraction in routes
(verifying that with_state() composes correctly for different types)
and nested router state isolation, ensuring child router state does
not leak into sibling routes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
